'''rawono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mcgovernite|mcgovernite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-w-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mcgovernite|mcgovernite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rawono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræweneth|ræweneth]] || [[word:ræwenej|ræwenej]] || [[word:ræwenesh|ræwenesh]] || [[word:ræwene|ræwene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rawowonoth|rawowonoth]] || [[word:rawowonoj|rawowonoj]] || [[word:rawowonosh|rawowonosh]] || [[word:rawowono|rawowono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rawonoth|rawonoth]] || [[word:rawonoj|rawonoj]] || [[word:rawonosh|rawonosh]] || [[word:rawono|rawono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rawofnoth|rawofnoth]] || [[word:rawofnoj|rawofnoj]] || [[word:rawofnosh|rawofnosh]] || [[word:rawofnof|rawofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rawonotho|rawonotho]] || [[word:rawonojo|rawonojo]] || [[word:rawonosho|rawonosho]] || [[word:rawonoko|rawonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rawonoth|rawonoth]] || [[word:rawonoj|rawonoj]] || [[word:rawonosh|rawonosh]] || [[word:rawono|rawono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rawonothol|rawonothol]] || [[word:rawonojol|rawonojol]] || [[word:rawonoshol|rawonoshol]] || [[word:rawonokol|rawonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rawonothotho|rawonothotho]] || [[word:rawonojojo|rawonojojo]] || [[word:rawonoshosho|rawonoshosho]] || [[word:rawonoko|rawonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rawonothon|rawonothon]] || [[word:rawonojon|rawonojon]] || [[word:rawonoshon|rawonoshon]] || [[word:rawonokon|rawonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rawonothoro|rawonothoro]] || [[word:rawonojoro|rawonojoro]] || [[word:rawonoshoro|rawonoshoro]] || [[word:rawonokoro|rawonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
